message:
Fix pre-existing StreamChunk match arms + add path.win32 stub

- Add HostcallOutcome::StreamChunk handling in promise bridge (log warning)
- Add StreamChunk handling in deliver_hostcall_completion (serialize chunk)
- Add path.win32 Proxy stub that throws on access (POSIX-only)
- Close bd-1av0.2: node:path shim was already fully implemented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
